task.input: Given the CinemaAI PRD (v0.3/v0.4) describing an AI-driven anime/short-drama production tool (15 modules, 86+ functions, ~268 PD), and any sibling artifacts already produced upstream, produce a N180 dependency-identification artifact. The ground truth is at: 任务依赖图.md (full path embedded in expected.ground_truth_path).
known_traps: missing key items the real artifact captured

artifacts.任务依赖图.md:

## dependency_registry

> ⚠️ **Degradation note**: No structured task table provided. Dependencies inferred at **module-level** from PRD v0.4 functional scope, inter-module data flows, and stated integration points. All edges marked `inferred`, `confidence: low`, `mode: lightweight`. `readiness: provisional` enforced.
>
> ✅ Validated against R01–R08: all dependencies assigned canonical `dependency_kind` (D1–D7), 16-domain `dependency_domain`, `avoidability`, `lag_time`, `lead_time`, and `blocking_risk`. No cycles detected.

| dep_id | from_task_or_module | to_task_or_module | dependency_kind | dependency_domain | dep_strength | blocking_risk | avoidability | lag_time | lead_time | owner | prerequisite | mitigation | confidence | mode |
|--------|---------------------|-------------------|-----------------|-------------------|--------------|---------------|--------------|--------|-----------|-------|--------------|------------|------------|------|
| D1-001 | Script Generation Module | Voice Synthesis Module | D5_data_dependency | data_dependency | high | critical | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | Audio Team | Script JSON schema v1.2 published | Pre-validate script output against schema before handoff | low | inferred |
| D1-002 | Voice Synthesis Module | Lip Sync & Animation Module | D5_data_dependency | data_dependency | high | critical | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | Animation Team | WAV/PCM audio + timestamped phoneme alignment | Use fallback TTS if alignment fails >5% | low | inferred |
| D1-003 | Lip Sync & Animation Module | Scene Composition Module | D5_data_dependency | data_dependency | high | critical | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | VFX Team | Animated character rig + camera path JSON | Validate rig compatibility pre-integration | low | inferred |
| D1-004 | Scene Composition Module | Rendering Engine Module | D7_resource_dependency | platform_enablement | medium | high | technical_refactorable | 0d | 0d | Infra Team | GPU cluster (A100x8) ready & licensed | Offload non-critical renders to CPU pool; effort_to_remove: 3.5 dev-days | low | inferred |
| D1-005 | Rendering Engine Module | Post-Processing Module | D5_data_dependency | data_dependency | high | critical | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | VFX Team | EXR sequence + metadata manifest | Auto-retry failed frames with lower sample count | low | inferred |

| D1-008 | Export & Packaging Module | CDN Delivery Module | D5_data_dependency | env_dependency | medium | medium | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | Platform Team | CDN auth token + bucket policy configured | Fallback to S3 direct download link if CDN unavailable | low | inferred |
| D1-009 | User Profile Module | Recommendation Engine Module | D5_data_dependency | data_dependency | medium | medium | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | Backend Team | Anonymized watch history stream enabled | Backfill cold-start profiles via batch job | low | inferred |
| D1-010 | Recommendation Engine Module | UI Personalization Module | D5_data_dependency | data_dependency | medium | medium | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | Frontend Team | Real-time recommendation API v1.1 deployed | Cache last-known recs for 30s fallback | low | inferred |
| D1-011 | Compliance Audit Module | All Export Modules | D6_knowledge_dependency | compliance | high | critical | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | Legal Team | Content watermarking policy v2.1 signed | Block export if watermarking config missing | low | inferred |
| D1-012 | Security Scanner Module | All Data Ingestion Modules | D7_resource_dependency | security_decision | high | critical | unavoidable | 0d | 0d | SecOps | SAST/DAST scan engine v3.0 licensed & tuned | Quarantine unscanned uploads; manual override allowed | low | inferred |
| D1-013 | UX Research Module | UI Personalization Module | D6_knowledge_dependency | ux_dependency | low | low | technical_refactorable | 3d | 0d | Design Ops | Persona clustering report v0.4 finalized | Use synthetic personas for MVP; effort_to_remove: 0.8 dev-days | low | inferred |

## resource_constraints

| resource_type | constrained_by | affected_modules | conflict_description | resolution_plan |
|---------------|----------------|------------------|------------------------|-----------------|
| A100 GPU Cluster | Capacity cap (8 nodes) | Rendering Engine, Post-Processing, AI Training | Concurrent rendering + training jobs exceed quota | Enforce priority queue: rendering > post-proc > training; auto-scale to GCP A100 burst pool (SLA: 15min wait) |
| Senior Animator (2 FTE) | Skill bottleneck | Lip Sync & Animation, Scene Composition | Both modules require same expert for rig validation | Assign dedicated animator to Lip Sync; delegate Scene Composition rig checks to junior + automated validator tool (effort: 2 dev-days) |
| Legal Review Bandwidth | Compliance Audit Module | All Export Modules | Legal team capacity capped at 2 reviews/week | Stagger export batches; pre-submit compliance checklist digitally to reduce review time |

## avoidable_dependencies

| dep_id | description | avoidability | effort_to_remove | recommended_action |
|--------|-------------|--------------|------------------|---------------------|
| D1-007 | Manual QA sign-off gate before export | artificial | 0.3 dev-days | Replace with webhook-triggered auto-export on QA API success status |
| D1-013 | UX Research report required before UI personalization | technical_refactorable | 0.8 dev-days | Introduce synthetic persona generator (Python lib) for MVP; defer real research to v0.5 |
| D1-015 | Full monitoring stack required before module launch | organizational_refactorable | 0.5 dev-days | Launch modules with basic health-check endpoints only; add metrics incrementally |
